notes: MADS = MassGIS Assessor Data Spine (statewide fallback assessor master).
Source: MassGIS ArcGIS Server MapServer/0 (parcel polygons + assessor attributes).
This pack builds a statewide assessor master NDJSON and writes CURRENT_MASSGIS_STATEWIDE_ASSESSOR_MASTER.json.
Geometry is not fetched (returnGeometry=false) to keep file sizes manageable; property spine already carries coords/geom.
